description_long: This is a large, multi-section wooden entertainment cabinet with a natural light wood finish and white panel doors. The structure features two tall side cabinets, each with two vertically stacked doors, and a central lower cabinet with two doors and open shelving in between. Above the central section is an open shelf, likely for media devices, and a large open space designed to accommodate a television or display. The cabinet stands on small feet and has a flat top surface, with all doors featuring small round handles. The back and sides are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements, and the overall design is modern and functional, suitable for living rooms or communal spaces.
description: A large, light wood entertainment cabinet with white panel doors, open shelving, and a central space for a television. It features multiple storage compartments and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all doors, open shelves, and the central TV space with visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and flat, featureless side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a flat, featureless panel.
